summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 5 features: New 3-tier pricing ($199/$299/$649), Central Alberta location updates, admin CMS (Site Content, Packages, Settings), and all content updates. All 25 backend API tests pass. All frontend pages verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Health endpoint returns healthy status
API root returns SkyLine Media branding with CAD currency
GET /api/packages returns 3 packages (Quick Aerial, Aerial Plus, FPV Showcase)
Quick Aerial package: $199 CAD with correct features
Aerial Plus package: $299 CAD marked as popular
FPV Showcase package: $649 CAD with FPV fly-through features
GET /api/site-content returns phone, email, location, service_areas, fleet
Site content phone: (825) 962-3425
Site content main_location: Central Alberta
Site content service_areas: Central Alberta ($0), Edmonton (+$80), Calgary (+$80)
Site content fleet: 4 drones including Pavo 20 Pro
Admin login with valid credentials (isaacsarver100@gmail.com)
Admin login rejects invalid credentials
GET /api/admin/site-content requires authentication
GET /api/admin/site-content returns editable content
PUT /api/admin/site-content saves data successfully
GET /api/admin/packages requires authentication
GET /api/admin/packages returns 3 packages
PUT /api/admin/packages saves packages successfully
GET /api/admin/settings requires authentication
GET /api/admin/settings returns SMTP configuration fields
GET /api/admin/stats returns dashboard stats with CAD currency
GET /api/admin/bookings returns booking list
GET /api/admin/clients returns client list
GET /api/admin/contacts returns contact list
Home page hero renders with Central Alberta & Red Deer text
Stats section shows 500+, 50+, 24hr, 100% with white text
Equipment section shows DJI Air 3 and Avata 2 images
Our Fleet lists 4 drones: Mavic 3 Pro, Air 3, Avata 2, Pavo 20 Pro
Footer shows Central Alberta and phone (825) 962-3425
Pricing page shows 3 packages: Quick Aerial $199, Aerial Plus $299, FPV Showcase $649
Pricing page travel fee notice: Central Alberta (no fee), Edmonton/Calgary (+$80)
Contact page shows phone (825) 962-3425 and Central Alberta service area
About page shows SkyLine Media (not SkyView), Transport Canada (not FAA)
About page lists Central Alberta locations with Edmonton/Calgary +$80
Portfolio page mentions Central Alberta (not Texas)
Services page includes Pavo 20 Pro and Transport Canada certified text
Booking page shows 4 service areas: Central Alberta, Edmonton (+$80), Calgary (+$80), Other
Admin dashboard has 7 nav items including Site Content, Packages, Settings
Admin Site Content page loads with phone, email, location, fleet, service areas editing
Admin Packages page loads with 3 packages and editing capability
Admin Settings page has SMTP configuration fields (host, port, user, password, sender_email)
seed_data_creation: None - site_content collection auto-seeded on startup with default values
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 5 features verified working: (1) New 3-tier pricing: Quick Aerial $199, Aerial Plus $299, FPV Showcase $649, (2) Location changed to Central Alberta (Red Deer & Area) with Edmonton/Calgary +$80 travel fee, (3) Phone: (825) 962-3425, (4) Fleet: Mavic 3 Pro, Air 3, Avata 2, Pavo 20 Pro, (5) Admin CMS pages: Site Content, Packages, Settings all functional, (6) All Austin/Texas/SkyView/FAA references replaced with Central Alberta/SkyLine Media/Transport Canada. Email notifications are MOCKED when SMTP not configured.

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email notifications fall back to mock mode when SMTP is not configured. Admin Settings page shows 'Not Configured' badge for SMTP.
